description: Teleport entities of a tag to a fixed point or a paired exit entity on a fresh contact edge. Timer-free: fires once on arrival, again only after the entrant leaves and returns; an entrant placed onto a portal by its pair is never bounced back.

tag.description: Tag of entities that can use the portal.

to.description: { x, y } destination (structural; used when targetId unset).

targetId.description: Id of an entity whose position is the destination.
